weather.headline: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
weather.detail: A chance of rain showers between noon and 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 77, with temperatures falling to around 73 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 5 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.
weather.tonight: Chance Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
